debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
⊢ Continuous g''

proof:
show Continuous (interpolated_deriv2 x y f)
    unfold interpolated_deriv2 nth_partial
    refine continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ => continuous_finset_sum _ (fun j _ => ?_))
    refine Continuous.mul continuous_const ?_
    show Continuous fun t => (fderiv ℝ (fun z => fderiv ℝ f z (EuclideanSpace.single j 1)) ((1 - t) • x + t • y)) (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)
    refine (ContinuousLinearMap.apply ℝ ℝ (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)).continuous.comp ?_
    have h1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (fderiv ℝ f) := fc.fderiv_right (m := 1) (by norm_num)
    have h2 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (fun z => fderiv ℝ f z (EuclideanSpace.single j 1)) :=
      h1.clm_apply contDiff_const
    exact (h2.continuous_fderiv (by norm_num)).comp (by fun_prop)
successful_attempts:
show Continuous (interpolated_deriv2 x y f)
    unfold interpolated_deriv2 nth_partial
    refine continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ => continuous_finset_sum _ (fun j _ => ?_))
    refine Continuous.mul continuous_const ?_
    show Continuous fun t => (fderiv ℝ (fun z => fderiv ℝ f z (EuclideanSpace.single j 1)) ((1 - t) • x + t • y)) (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)
    refine (ContinuousLinearMap.apply ℝ ℝ (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)).continuous.comp ?_
    have h1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (fderiv ℝ f) := fc.fderiv_right (m := 1) (by norm_num)
    have h2 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (fun z => fderiv ℝ f z (EuclideanSpace.single j 1)) :=
      h1.clm_apply contDiff_const
    exact (h2.continuous_fderiv (by norm_num)).comp (by fun_prop)
